commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=56306550a540f269879fae4296b64fc2c0d9e5c0)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a reusable boolean to portable presentation buttons, carries it through Discord presentation mapping, copies it into generated component entries, and adds focused adapter/component tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has reusable-aware Discord component entries and handlers, but the portable presentation schema/type and Discord mapper drop button-level reusable before registration. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof before merge; ClawSweeper should not create a repair PR for proof that must come from the contributor's or maintainer's runtime.

target.title: Preserve reusable Discord presentation buttons
target.body:
## Summary

Adds `reusable` to portable presentation buttons and preserves it through Discord presentation mapping into generated component entries.

## Motivation

Closes #84182.

Presentation buttons can represent repeatable actions such as refresh or more-detail, but the portable schema and Discord mapper dropped the reusable intent before registry entries were created.

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- Adds `reusable?: boolean` to the presentation button type and tool schema.
- Carries `reusable: true` from presentation buttons into Discord button specs.
- Preserves per-button reusable state when Discord component entries are built.

## Linked Issue/PR

Closes #84182.

## Real behavior proof

Focused automated proof covers the adapter boundary: a presentation button with `reusable: true` now produces a Discord button spec with `reusable: true`, and component builder coverage verifies entries still register correctly.

## Root Cause

Discord component entries supported reusable behavior, but portable presentation buttons had no reusable schema field and the Discord presentation mapper only copied label, style, callback data, and URL.

## Regression Test Plan

- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/discord/src/shared-interactive.test.ts extensions/discord/src/components.test.ts`

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

Message senders can now use `presentation.blocks[].buttons[].reusable` for Discord presentation buttons.

## Diagram

N/A. This is a direct schema and adapter propagation fix.

## Security Impact

No new secrets or network calls. The change only preserves an explicit boolean in already-authored message payloads.

## Repro + Verification

Before this change, a presentation button authored with reusable intent could not carry that intent through the message tool schema and Discord presentation mapper. The new test asserts that the generated Discord component spec retains it.

## Evidence

Focused tests pass with the command in the regression plan.

## Human Verification

Not performed against a live Discord service; this PR is scoped to the deterministic presentation-to-component mapping and registry-entry construction.

## Compatibility / Migration

Backward compatible. Existing payloads are unchanged unless they opt into `reusable: true`.

## Risks

Low. The flag is only emitted when explicitly set to true.
target.author: 100menotu001
